tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Flowers & Fruits Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Flowers & Fruits Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The rose flower is red. The lotus grows in water. The sunflower turns towards the sun. The jasmine's fragrance is very nice. Marigold flowers are used in worship.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Flowers & Fruits Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Flowers & Fruits Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The lily is white in colour. Tulips bloom in spring. The hibiscus flower is medicinal. Mango is a summer fruit. Banana is full of energy.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "सेब सेहत के लिए अच्छा है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "The jasmine's fragrance are very nice."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The jasmine's fragrance is very nice.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Flowers & Fruits Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Flowers & Fruits Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Grapes are small and sweet. Watermelon gives coolness in summer. Papaya is good for digestion. Guava is a cheap and nutritious fruit.
